record.comment: As added Pub. L. 115-271, title VII, sec. 7072, Oct. 24, 2018, 132 Stat. 4030.

As added Pub. L. 115-271, title VII, sec. 7152, Oct. 24, 2018, 132 Stat. 4058.
As added Pub. L. 115-271, title VII, sec. 7031, Oct. 24, 2018, 132 Stat. 4014.
As added Pub. L. 115-271, title VIII, sec. 8214, Oct. 24, 2018, 132 Stat. 4116. Two actsecs. 550 have been enacted by Pub. L. 115-271.
As added Pub. L. 115-271, title VII, sec. 7101, Oct. 24, 2018, 132 Stat. 4037.
As added Pub. L. 115-271, title VII, sec. 7121(a), Oct. 24, 2018, 132 Stat. 4043.

As added Pub. L. 115-398, sec. 2, 132 Stat. 5328.

As added Pub. L 115-263 sec. 2, Oct. 10, 2018, 123 Stat. 3672.
